lede: A look at May 2 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Manfred von Richthofen and Satyajit Ray, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2014 Badakhshan mudslides
events.desc: Two mudslides in Badakhshan, Afghanistan, leave up to 2,500 people missing.

events.title: Osama bin Laden
events.desc: Osama bin Laden, the mastermind behind the September 11 attacks and the FBI's most wanted fugitive, is killed by the United States Navy SEALs in Abbottabad, Pakistan.

events.title: Chaitén (volcano)
events.desc: Chaitén Volcano begins erupting in Chile, forcing the evacuation of more than 4,500 people.

events.title: Bill Clinton
events.desc: President Bill Clinton announces that accurate GPS access would no longer be restricted to the United States military.

events.title: Croatian War of Independence
events.desc: During the Croatian War of Independence, the Army of the Republic of Serb Krajina fires cluster bombs at Zagreb, killing seven and wounding over 175 civilians.

events.title: Chernobyl disaster
events.desc: Chernobyl disaster: The City of Chernobyl is evacuated six days after the disaster.

events.title: Falklands War
events.desc: Falklands War: The British nuclear submarine HMS Conqueror sinks the Argentine cruiser ARA General Belgrano.

events.title: Vietnam War
events.desc: Vietnam War: An explosion sinks the American aircraft carrier USNS Card while it is docked at Saigon. Two Viet Cong combat swimmers had placed explosives on the ship's hull. She is raised and returned to service less than seven months later.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Following the coup d'état against Iraq Crown Prince 'Abd al-Ilah earlier that year, the United Kingdom launches the Anglo-Iraqi War to restore him to power.

events.title: Richard I of England
events.desc: King Richard I of England gives Portsmouth its first royal charter.

births.name: Édouard Balladur
births.line: Turkish-French economist and politician, 162nd Prime Minister of France

deaths.text: Osama bin Laden, Saudi Arabian terrorist, founder of Al-Qaeda
Leonardo da Vinci, Italian painter, sculptor, and architect

observances.text: Christian feast day: Athanasius of Alexandria (Western Christianity)
Christian feast day: Boris I of Bulgaria (Bulgarian Orthodox Church)
Christian feast day: Joseph Luu Van Nguyen (Catholic Church)
